forge.fastMode.description: Enable Fast Mode. When enabled, the Orchestrator will be bypassed to keep looping the TDD Coder until all unchecked tasks are completed.

forge.mvpDemoMode.description: Enable MVP Demo Mode. Runs a deterministic, lightweight multi-agent walkthrough using local fallback stubs.

forge.credentialsFile.description: Absolute path to a custom Google Cloud service account JSON credentials file.

forge.quotaProject.description: Custom Google Cloud project ID to use for quota and billing.

forge.location.description: Google Cloud location for the Vertex AI Reasoning Engine endpoint.

forge.endpointId.description: The full Resource Name ID of your deployed Vertex AI Reasoning Engine.

forge.maxOrchestratorRetries.description: Maximum number of times the Orchestrator is allowed to fail (e.g., returning invalid JSON) before triggering fallback routing.

forge.mvpMaxTurnsPerAgent.description: Maximum number of tool-execution turns allowed per agent when running in MVP Demo Mode.

scripts.pretest: npm run compile && npm run lint
